content.query:
/*============================================================
  Recreate incremental silver tables for demo project
============================================================*/

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.customers_inc', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.customers_inc;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.customers_inc
(
    customer_id      INT           NULL,
    customer_name    VARCHAR(200)  NULL,
    city             VARCHAR(100)  NULL,
    signup_date      DATE          NULL,
    created_at_utc   DATETIME2     NULL,
    updated_at_utc   DATETIME2     NULL,
    load_run_id      VARCHAR(100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.products_inc', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.products_inc;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.products_inc
(
    product_id       INT            NULL,
    product_name     VARCHAR(200)   NULL,
    category         VARCHAR(100)   NULL,
    unit_price       DECIMAL(18,2)  NULL,
    created_at_utc   DATETIME2      NULL,
    updated_at_utc   DATETIME2      NULL,
    load_run_id      VARCHAR(100)   NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.orders_inc', 'U') IS NOT NULL
    DROP TABLE silver.orders_inc;
GO

CREATE TABLE silver.orders_inc
(
    order_id         INT           NULL,
    customer_id      INT           NULL,
    product_id       INT           NULL,
    quantity         INT           NULL,
    order_date       DATE          NULL,
    created_at_utc   DATETIME2     NULL,
    updated_at_utc   DATETIME2     NULL,
    load_run_id      VARCHAR(100)  NULL
)
WITH
(
    DISTRIBUTION = ROUND_ROBIN,
    HEAP
);
GO
